description: Return a company currency configuration by company ID

currency_iso_code.description: Currency ISO Code. This value is null if the project currency configuration does not exist.

currency_display.description: Currency Display Options. This value is null if the project currency configuration does not exist.

multicurrency_enabled.description: Whether multicurrency is enabled for the company

multicurrency_enabled_effective_date.description: When multicurrency was enabled for the company

eligible_for_multicurrency.description: Whether the company is eligible for multicurrency features
